events.text: Mohammed Kudus (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
André Ayew (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Alidu Seidu (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Portugal 1, Ghana 0. Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the top left corner.
Goal!  Portugal 1, Ghana 1. André Ayew (Ghana) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal.
Goal!  Portugal 2, Ghana 1. João Félix (Portugal) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Bruno Fernandes with a through ball.
Goal!  Portugal 3, Ghana 1. Rafael Leão (Portugal) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Bruno Fernandes   following a fast break.
Goal!  Portugal 3, Ghana 2. Osman Bukari (Ghana) header from the centre of the box to the top right corner.
Iñaki Williams (Ghana) is shown the yellow card.
Danilo Pereira (Portugal) is shown the yellow card.
Bruno Fernandes (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
